hero.title: Systems Engineer

hero.description: Backend Developer specialized in Go, Python and Java. Expert in microservices and scalable architectures.

about.title: About me
about.description1: Software engineer focused on building reliable backend systems and services that scale. I care about simple architectures, solid tooling, and shipping things that actually work.
about.description2: I enjoy digging deep into problems, working with strong teams, and giving back to the local tech community.

jobs.description: Technical support and solution engineering for critical systems
Design and development of microservices in Go and Python to automate mobile line activation
Development of enhancements for critical public service systems
Design and optimization of PostgreSQL databases with Django ORM
Contributing to local tech community growth
